testsuite.name: tests.PositiveLambdaTest

testcase.name: Заполнение всех полей формы студента, и проверка на соответствие

testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - No webdriver is bound to current thread: 1 - let's create a new webdriver [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - BrowserName=chrome Version=128.0.6613.137 Platform=linux [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenide v. 6.19.1 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenium WebDriver v. 4.13.0 build revision: ba948ece5b* [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.CreateDriverCommand - Created webdriver in thread 1: RemoteWebDriver -> RemoteWebDriver: chrome on linux (17360927666ccfb9df33412c2eee86d4) [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Register WebDriverInstance[config=StaticConfig,webDriver=RemoteWebDriver: chrome on linux (17360927666ccfb9df33412c2eee86d4),proxy=null,downloadsFolder=null] in 1 [size=1] [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Add shutdown hook in 1 [size=1]
